title: Login fails for members with BPS SSO accounts
body: Multiple members at Eastbridge and other chapters report that logging in with their BPS SSO credentials redirects to a blank page. The portal login with email/password works fine. Affects any account linked to bps.edu.

title: Petition signature count not updating in real time
body: After a member signs the contract petition, the live counter on the campaign page does not update until a hard refresh. The backend records the signature correctly. This is a front-end state issue.

title: Add Period 9 DBQ packet to product catalog
body: Currently the Etsy shop has Periods 1-8. Period 9 (2001-present) is highly requested by teachers. Need to create a matching DBQ packet, upload to Etsy, and add to the repo docs.

title: Generator outputs duplicate prompts on Period 4 when n>6
body: When requesting more than 6 prompts for Period 4, the generator starts repeating prompts. The period_4_prompts list only has 6 entries. Need to expand the seed list or add a fallback.

title: Mobile nav menu does not close after link tap
body: On mobile, tapping a nav link navigates to the page but the hamburger menu stays open and overlaps the content. Reproduced on iOS Safari and Android Chrome.

title: Add primary sources for the 1919 Boston Police Strike
body: The labor history unit covers big national strikes but misses the 1919 BPD strike, which is very locally relevant for Boston students. Add 3-4 primary sources and a discussion guide.

title: Document download returns 403 for non-admin members
body: Regular members get a 403 when trying to download PDFs from the documents library. Admin accounts work fine. The S3 presigned URL generation may be checking the wrong role.

title: Rate limiting too aggressive for classroom use
body: When a class of 28 students hits the API at the same time, requests start getting 429 errors after about 10 seconds. The current limit is 20 req/min per IP, but we need at least 50 for classroom simultaneous use.

title: Bulk download bundle for Full Year purchase
body: Several buyers have asked for a single ZIP of all individual unit packets rather than downloading each separately. Would boost the value of the full-year bundle listing.

title: Export to CSV not including grievance outcome field
body: When exporting grievance records to CSV, the outcome column is empty for all resolved grievances. The field populates in the UI but is not mapped in the CSV serializer.

title: Add email notification when grievance status changes
body: Members should receive an automated email when their grievance moves from 'filed' to 'in review' or 'resolved'. Currently there is no notification and reps have to call members to update them.

title: Timeline does not render on Safari 16
body: Multiple teachers report the timeline tool is blank on Safari 16. Dev tools show a CSS grid error related to subgrid which is not supported on Safari 16. Need a fallback layout.

title: Blog RSS feed returns 500 on all requests
body: The RSS feed endpoint at /feed.xml has been returning 500 since the June 1 deploy. Likely related to the Markdown frontmatter schema change for draft posts.

title: Grievance form - Category field missing 'Article 20 - Working Conditions'
body: The grievance form category dropdown is missing the Article 20 Working Conditions option. Members filing hall duty or coverage grievances have to use 'Other' as a workaround. Need to add this category.

title: Update for 2025-26 season roster
body: The dashboard still has the 2024-25 roster. Update player IDs for the 2025-26 season and adjust the stats endpoints to pull from the current season parameter.

title: Dues reconciliation script fails on members with hyphenated names
body: The CSV reconciliation script throws a KeyError when parsing names with hyphens. Affects at least 4 members in the chapter. Need to add a name normalization step before matching.

title: Add dark mode support to the portal
body: Several members have requested a dark mode option for the portal, especially for evening use. A CSS custom property approach would make it easy to implement without a full theme overhaul.

title: Fix typo in Period 5 DBQ packet answer key
body: Page 8 of the Period 5 DBQ packet answer key says 'Compromise of 1850' where it should say 'Missouri Compromise'. Several buyers have flagged this in Etsy reviews. Push corrected file.

title: Draft talking points for June 17 rally
body: Need talking points for building reps to use at the June 17 rally. Focus on the wage proposal, prep time protection, and class size cap. Coordinate with citywide campaign messaging.

title: Add accessibility alt text to all historical photograph embeds
body: Current lesson plan HTML files embed historical photos without alt text, which fails WCAG 2.1 AA. Need to add descriptive alt text to all images across units 1-6.
